text: - Highest level of support is the standard
- Diversity-owned firm (competitive edge for enterprise/govt contracts)
- QBO uses OAuth 2.0 — need Client ID + Client Secret from Intuit Developer portal
- Gave Mike two options: check if existing dev app exists, or walk him through creating one
- Mike asked about moving 150K LinkedIn followers to Instagram
- Purpose: client-side marketing to drive job orders (not recruiting)
- Advised: LinkedIn posts from personal page more impactful for B2B; IG for brand building
- Blog recommended as content hub that feeds LinkedIn + email + IG
- Last message from Mike: 6:04 PM — waiting on his response re: QuickBooks OAuth setup
- 22:10 PDT — Heartbeat ran. QuickBooks OAuth in progress — credentials saved, awaiting redirect URI setup.
